title: The Phantom Vessel
description: The Harbor Captain of Dalhurst is troubled. Fishermen have reported sighting a ghostly ship sailing without crew at night, and several boats have gone missing. He needs someone brave enough to investigate the abandoned lighthouse on the coast where the phantom ship was last seen.

objectives.description: Travel to the abandoned lighthouse on the western coast
Deal with the drowned dead haunting the lighthouse
Discover the source of the haunting
